title: CivicPress Module Manifest
description: Manifest format for CivicPress modules and schema-extensions. See docs/specs/module-contract.md for the full contract.

$schema.description: URL/path to this JSON Schema (recommended for IDE autocomplete).

name.description: Module canonical name. MUST match the directory name (or <group>/<name> for nested modules).

kind.description: module = full module with code; schema-extension = schema fragments only (no code).

capabilities.description: What this module contributes. Each capability is opt-in.

schemaExtensions.description: Record types this module contributes a JSON Schema fragment to. Fragment must live at <module-dir>/schemas/record-schema-extension.json.

routes.description: If true, entry must export registerRoutes(app: Express).

audit.description: If true, entry must export registerAuditConsumers(channel: AuditChannel).

cli.description: If true, entry must export registerCliCommands(program: Commander).

lifecycle.description: If true, entry must export init(services) and/or shutdown().

entry.description: Path to module entry file, relative to module.json. Required when kind = 'module'.

dependencies.description: Names of other modules this module depends on.

then.description: Full modules MUST declare an entry file.
